full_text:
Wen Hui (Manji) 溫恢 (曼基)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Hui (溫恢), styledManji (曼基), was born in Taiyuan. Warned that the Wu front was secure but that Cao Ren might have problems against Guan Yu. Wen Hui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wen Hui lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
